---
title: Shama Hasan
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-grid}

::: {.hero-text}
#### Evolution of Apicomplexan Parasites

:::
<!-- 
::: {.hero-image}
![](headshots/){alt="" class="headshot"}
![](headshots/){alt="" class="fieldshot"}
:::
-->

:::

<hr class="section-divider">

::: {.content-card}
## About Me

Your info!

Here you'll find information about my research, outreach and education activities, and my comprehensive lab notebook documenting ongoing projects and findings.
:::

<hr class="section-divider">

::: {.content-card}
## Contact

##### Shama Hasan
 

##### Email:  
[shasan01 (at) wm.edu](mailto:shasan01@wm.edu)  

##### Mailing Address:    
 

---

### Find me online

- [GitHub](https://github.com/shamahasan)  
:::
